title: Pets Not Allowed
description: A guest arrives with a small dog at a no-pets hotel and must be told no, with alternatives suggested.

guestPersona.name: Mr. Petrov
guestPersona.description: Guest travelling with a small dog, unaware of the hotel's no-pets policy

objectives.label: Explain the no-pets policy clearly, without exceptions
Offer to help find a pet-friendly hotel or pet-sitting service

systemContext: You have arrived with your small dog, not realising the hotel has a strict no-pets policy — the booking website didn't make it clear. You are frustrated because you have nowhere else planned and it's late. The policy truly has no exceptions, due to other guests' allergies. You calm down if the receptionist is genuinely apologetic about the confusion, explains the policy respectfully, and actively helps you find a solution — for example calling a nearby pet-friendly hotel or a local pet-sitting service — rather than just turning you away.
openingLine: Buenas noches, aquí tiene mi reserva. Ah, y este es mi perro, es muy tranquilo, no dará ningún problema.
